quotes.quote: Means are, after all, everything. As the means, so the end.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: The best way to find yourself is to lose yourself in the service of others.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Poverty is the worst form of violence.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Earth provides enough to satisfy every man's need, but not every man's greed.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: An eye for an eye makes the whole world blind.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: The future depends on what we do in the present.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: The weak can never forgive. Forgiveness is the attribute of the strong.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: A nation's culture resides in the hearts and souls of its people.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: There are people in the world so hungry that God cannot appear to them except in the form of bread.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Cultivation of mind should be the ultimate aim of human existence.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: Democracy is not merely a form of government. It is primarily a mode of associated living.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: I measure the progress of a community by the degree of progress which women have achieved.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: Political democracy cannot last unless there lies at the base of it social democracy.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: Life should be great rather than long.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: Religion must mainly be a matter of principles only. It cannot be a matter of rules.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: Lost rights are never regained by appeals to the conscience of the usurpers.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: We want that education by which character is formed, strength of mind is increased, and intellect is expanded.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.quote: Arise, awake and stop not till the goal is reached.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.quote: Service to man is service to God.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.quote: All the powers in the universe are already ours. It is we who have put our hands before our eyes and cry that it is dark.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.quote: The greatest religion is to be true to your own nature. Have faith in yourselves.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.quote: Where the mind is without fear and the head is held high, into that heaven of freedom, my Father, let my country awake.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: Where the clear stream of reason has not lost its way into the dreary desert sand of dead habit.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: You can't cross the sea merely by standing and staring at the water.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: The highest education is that which does not merely give us information but makes our life in harmony with all existence.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: Culture is the widening of the mind and of the spirit.
quotes.author: Jawaharlal Nehru

quotes.quote: At the stroke of the midnight hour, when the world sleeps, India will awake to life and freedom.
quotes.author: Jawaharlal Nehru

quotes.quote: Swaraj is my birthright and I shall have it.
quotes.author: Bal Gangadhar Tilak

quotes.quote: The civil servant must have the mind of a scholar and the heart of a mother.
quotes.author: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel

quotes.quote: At his best, man is the noblest of all animals; separated from law and justice, he is the worst.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Man is by nature a political animal.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: The roots of education are bitter, but the fruit is sweet.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: Treat humanity, whether in your own person or in another, always as an end and never merely as a means.
quotes.author: Immanuel Kant

quotes.quote: Act only according to that maxim by which you can also will it to become a universal law.
quotes.author: Immanuel Kant

quotes.quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this and you will find strength.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: The obstacle is the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: What is not good for the beehive cannot be good for the bees.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: The measure of a man is what he does with power.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: The greatest happiness of the greatest number is the foundation of morals and legislation.
quotes.author: Jeremy Bentham

quotes.quote: Justice is the first virtue of social institutions.
quotes.author: John Rawls

quotes.quote: The life of man is solitary, poor, nasty, brutish, and short — without society.
quotes.author: Thomas Hobbes

quotes.quote: Knowledge is power.
quotes.author: Francis Bacon

quotes.quote: Power tends to corrupt, and absolute power corrupts absolutely.
quotes.author: Lord Acton

quotes.quote: Man is born free, and everywhere he is in chains.
quotes.author: Jean-Jacques Rousseau

quotes.quote: The end of law is not to abolish or restrain but to preserve and enlarge freedom.
quotes.author: John Locke

quotes.quote: The government is best which governs least.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about things that matter.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate; only love can do that.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Wars are poor chisels for carving out peaceful tomorrows.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: It always seems impossible until it is done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: Poverty is not an accident. Like slavery and apartheid, it is man-made and can be removed by human actions.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: A good head and a good heart are always a formidable combination.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: Overcoming poverty is not a gesture of charity. It is an act of justice.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: Development can be seen as a process of expanding the real freedoms that people enjoy.
quotes.author: Amartya Sen

quotes.quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Will Durant

quotes.quote: Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man's character, give him power.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: The ballot is stronger than the bullet.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Character is what you do when nobody is watching.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.quote: The price of liberty is eternal vigilance.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.quote: Democracy is the worst form of government, except for all the others.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: The price of greatness is responsibility.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: Ask not what your country can do for you; ask what you can do for your country.
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: The rights of every man are diminished when the rights of one man are threatened.
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: The test of our progress is not whether we add more to the abundance of those who have much; it is whether we provide enough for those who have too little.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: The important thing is not to stop questioning. Curiosity has its own reason for existing.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Science without religion is lame, religion without science is blind.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: I raise up my voice not so I can shout, but so that those without a voice can be heard.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: We cannot all succeed when half of us are held back.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: One child, one teacher, one book, one pen can change the world.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: No country can ever truly flourish if it stifles the potential of its women.
quotes.author: Michelle Obama

quotes.quote: There is no tool for development more effective than the empowerment of women.
quotes.author: Kofi Annan

quotes.quote: Literacy is a bridge from misery to hope.
quotes.author: Kofi Annan

quotes.quote: If you are neutral in situations of injustice, you have chosen the side of the oppressor.
quotes.author: Desmond Tutu

quotes.quote: Inequality is not inevitable. It is a policy choice.
quotes.author: Joseph Stiglitz

quotes.quote: In the long run, we are all dead.
quotes.author: John Maynard Keynes

quotes.quote: The economy is a wholly owned subsidiary of the environment.
quotes.author: Herman Daly

quotes.quote: Small is beautiful.
quotes.author: E. F. Schumacher

quotes.quote: Rank does not confer privilege or give power. It imposes responsibility.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.quote: Integrity without knowledge is weak and useless, and knowledge without integrity is dangerous and dreadful.
quotes.author: Samuel Johnson

quotes.quote: Ethics is knowing the difference between what you have a right to do and what is right to do.
quotes.author: Potter Stewart

quotes.quote: Leadership is not about being in charge. It is about taking care of those in your charge.
quotes.author: Simon Sinek

quotes.quote: The function of leadership is to produce more leaders, not more followers.
quotes.author: Ralph Nader

quotes.quote: A leader is best when people barely know he exists.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: It does not matter how slowly you go, so long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The strength of a nation derives from the integrity of the home.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: All animals are equal, but some animals are more equal than others.
quotes.author: George Orwell

quotes.quote: No man is an island, entire of itself.
quotes.author: John Donne

quotes.quote: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.
quotes.author: W. B. Yeats

quotes.quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: The more I read, the more I acquire, the more certain I am that I know nothing.
quotes.author: Voltaire

quotes.quote: Education is the passport to the future, for tomorrow belongs to those who prepare for it today.
quotes.author: Malcolm X

quotes.quote: If you think education is expensive, try ignorance.
quotes.author: Derek Bok

quotes.quote: The harder the conflict, the greater the triumph.
quotes.author: Thomas Paine

quotes.quote: The saddest aspect of life right now is that science gathers knowledge faster than society gathers wisdom.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.quote: Climate change is the greatest threat to our existence in our short history on this planet.
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.quote: The greatest threat to our planet is the belief that someone else will save it.
quotes.author: Robert Swan

quotes.quote: In every walk with nature, one receives far more than he seeks.
quotes.author: John Muir

quotes.quote: The earth does not belong to us. We belong to the earth.
quotes.author: Chief Seattle

quotes.quote: We do not inherit the earth from our ancestors; we borrow it from our children.
quotes.author: Native American Proverb

quotes.quote: There is no way to peace; peace is the way.
quotes.author: A. J. Muste

quotes.quote: In peace, sons bury their fathers. In war, fathers bury their sons.
quotes.author: Herodotus

quotes.quote: The United Nations was not created to take mankind to heaven, but to save humanity from hell.
quotes.author: Dag Hammarskjöld

quotes.quote: Diplomacy is the art of letting someone else have your way.
quotes.author: Daniele Vare

quotes.quote: Where law ends, tyranny begins.
quotes.author: William Pitt

quotes.quote: Without courage, wisdom bears no fruit.
quotes.author: Baltasar Gracián

quotes.quote: Character is destiny.
quotes.author: Heraclitus

quotes.quote: Truth is one, the wise call it by many names.
quotes.author: Rigveda

quotes.quote: Sarve bhavantu sukhinah — May all beings be happy.
quotes.author: Upanishads

quotes.quote: Ahimsa paramo dharma — Non-violence is the highest virtue.
quotes.author: Mahabharata

quotes.quote: Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam — The world is one family.
quotes.author: Maha Upanishad

quotes.quote: Let noble thoughts come to us from all directions.
quotes.author: Rigveda

quotes.quote: You have a right to perform your prescribed duties, but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: The soul is neither born, nor does it die at any time.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: That which is hateful to you, do not do to your neighbor.
quotes.author: Talmud

quotes.quote: Do unto others as you would have them do unto you.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Hurt not others in ways that you yourself would find hurtful.
quotes.author: Buddhism

quotes.quote: No one of you is a believer until he desires for his brother that which he desires for himself.
quotes.author: Hadith

quotes.quote: It takes a village to raise a child.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.quote: When the roots are deep, there is no reason to fear the wind.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.quote: Educate a man and you educate an individual. Educate a woman and you educate a nation.
quotes.author: African Proverb

quotes.quote: When spiders unite, they can tie down a lion.
quotes.author: Ethiopian Proverb

quotes.quote: Give a man a fish and you feed him for a day; teach a man to fish and you feed him for a lifetime.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.quote: Light a candle rather than curse the darkness.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.quote: The nail that sticks out gets hammered down.
quotes.author: Japanese Proverb

quotes.quote: United we stand, divided we fall.
quotes.author: Aesop

quotes.quote: The forest would be silent if no bird sang except the one that sang best.
quotes.author: Henry Van Dyke

quotes.quote: Even the longest night will end and the sun will rise.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: The chain is only as strong as its weakest link.
quotes.author: Thomas Reid

quotes.quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: The greatest good you can do for another is not just share your riches, but reveal to them their own.
quotes.author: Benjamin Disraeli

quotes.quote: Where justice is denied, where poverty is enforced, where ignorance prevails, crime will grow.
quotes.author: Frederick Douglass

quotes.quote: The hungry man is not a free man.
quotes.author: Adlai Stevenson

quotes.quote: Hunger is not an issue of charity. It is an issue of justice.
quotes.author: Jacques Diouf

quotes.quote: The test of a civilization is the way that it cares for its helpless members.
quotes.author: Pearl S. Buck

quotes.quote: A society that puts equality before freedom will get neither. A society that puts freedom before equality will get a high degree of both.
quotes.author: Milton Friedman

quotes.quote: Not everything that counts can be counted, and not everything that can be counted counts.
quotes.author: William Bruce Cameron

quotes.quote: The first rule of any technology is that automation applied to efficient operation will magnify the efficiency.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.quote: Technology is neither good nor bad; nor is it neutral.
quotes.author: Melvin Kranzberg

quotes.quote: The machine does not isolate man from the great problems of nature but plunges him more deeply into them.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: Man is condemned to be free.
quotes.author: Jean-Paul Sartre

quotes.quote: The difference between a moral man and a man of honor is that the latter regrets a discreditable act even when it has worked.
quotes.author: H. L. Mencken

quotes.quote: It is not the oath that makes us believe the man, but the man the oath.
quotes.author: Aeschylus

quotes.quote: Shoot for the moon. Even if you miss, you'll land among the stars.
quotes.author: Norman Vincent Peale

quotes.quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
quotes.author: Arthur Ashe

quotes.quote: The most common way people give up their power is by thinking they don't have any.
quotes.author: Alice Walker

quotes.quote: A woman with a voice is by definition a strong woman.
quotes.author: Melinda Gates

quotes.quote: Give me blood and I will give you freedom.
quotes.author: Subhash Chandra Bose

quotes.quote: A country's greatness lies in its undying ideals of love and sacrifice that inspire the mothers of the race.
quotes.author: Sarojini Naidu

quotes.quote: There is nothing noble in being superior to your fellow man. True nobility is being superior to your former self.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.quote: I think therefore I am.
quotes.author: René Descartes

quotes.quote: It is not enough to have a good mind. The main thing is to use it well.
quotes.author: René Descartes

quotes.quote: With great power comes great responsibility.
quotes.author: Voltaire

quotes.quote: So long as ignorance and misery remain on earth, books of the nature of this one cannot be useless.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: The pen is mightier than the sword.
quotes.author: Edward Bulwer-Lytton

quotes.quote: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, today is a gift — that is why it is called the present.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Where, after all, do universal human rights begin? In small places, close to home.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: The beautiful thing about learning is that nobody can take it away from you.
quotes.author: B. B. King

quotes.quote: Real education should consist of drawing the goodness and best out of our own students.
quotes.author: Cesar Chavez

quotes.quote: Ethics is nothing else than reverence for life.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: Non-violence is the greatest force at the disposal of mankind. It is mightier than the mightiest weapon of destruction.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Educate, Agitate, Organise.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: Faith is the bird that feels the light when the dawn is still dark.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: The greatest sin is to think yourself weak.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.quote: Confine yourself to the present.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: The only freedom which deserves the name is that of pursuing our own good in our own way.
quotes.author: John Stuart Mill

quotes.quote: The legal subordination of one sex to the other is wrong in itself, and one of the chief hindrances to human improvement.
quotes.author: John Stuart Mill

quotes.quote: The health of a democratic society may be measured by the quality of functions performed by private citizens.
quotes.author: Alexis de Tocqueville

quotes.quote: The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing.
quotes.author: Edmund Burke

quotes.quote: A rising tide lifts all boats.
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: You can fool all the people some of the time, and some of the people all the time, but you cannot fool all the people all the time.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Constitutional morality is not a natural sentiment. It has to be cultivated.
quotes.author: B. R. Ambedkar

quotes.quote: The scientific temper of mind is essential not only for the application of science but for life itself.
quotes.author: Jawaharlal Nehru

quotes.quote: Strength does not come from physical capacity. It comes from an indomitable will.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Happiness is the settling of the soul into its most appropriate spot.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Duty is the necessity to act out of reverence for the law.
quotes.author: Immanuel Kant

quotes.quote: The general will is always right, but the judgment which guides it is not always enlightened.
quotes.author: Jean-Jacques Rousseau

quotes.quote: I turn the wheel that spins. I delight to see the high come down and the low ascend.
quotes.author: Boethius

quotes.quote: It is not that we have a short time to live, but that we waste a lot of it.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: Make the best use of what is in your power, and take the rest as it happens.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: The more laws, the less justice.
quotes.author: Cicero

quotes.quote: The welfare of the people is the ultimate law.
quotes.author: Cicero

quotes.quote: If you cry because the sun has gone out of your life, your tears will prevent you from seeing the stars.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: Beauty will save the world.
quotes.author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

quotes.quote: In the midst of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: It is not the strongest of the species that survives, nor the most intelligent, but the one most responsive to change.
quotes.author: Charles Darwin

quotes.quote: The world must be made safe for democracy.
quotes.author: Woodrow Wilson

quotes.quote: I don't know what your destiny will be, but one thing I know: the ones among you who will be really happy are those who have sought and found how to serve.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: The greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: The rise and fall of civilizations depends on their social solidarity and the character of their people.
quotes.author: Ibn Khaldun

quotes.quote: In the happiness of his subjects lies the king's happiness; in their welfare his welfare.
quotes.author: Kautilya

quotes.quote: The enemy of my enemy is my friend.
quotes.author: Kautilya

quotes.quote: Before you start some work, always ask yourself three questions: Why am I doing it, what the results might be, and will I be successful.
quotes.author: Chanakya

quotes.quote: The wound is the place where the light enters you.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: Raise your words, not your voice. It is rain that grows flowers, not thunder.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: Bura jo dekhan main chala, bura na milya koy; jo man khoja apna, toh mujhse bura na koy.
quotes.author: Kabir

quotes.quote: Khudi ko kar buland itna ki har taqdir se pehle, Khuda bande se khud pooche bata teri raza kya hai.
quotes.author: Allama Iqbal

quotes.quote: Literature is the criticism of life.
quotes.author: Munshi Premchand

quotes.quote: Teachers should be the best minds in the country.
quotes.author: S. Radhakrishnan

quotes.quote: Dream is not what you see in sleep, dream is the thing which does not let you sleep.
quotes.author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam

quotes.quote: You have to dream before your dreams can come true.
quotes.author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam

quotes.quote: Failure will never overtake me if my determination to succeed is strong enough.
quotes.author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam

quotes.quote: Love is not a mere impulse, it must contain truth, which is law.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: A friend to all is a friend to none.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Speak only if it improves upon the silence.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Loss is nothing else but change, and change is Nature's delight.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Truth can be stated in a thousand different ways, yet each one can be true.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda
